title: Find Help | My Site
text_excerpt: --> Find Help | My Site top of page Home About Kim News In Parliament In Spen Valley Contact Office Standards Find Help More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Where to find help This booklet is designed to signpost people in Spen Valley to where you can get help, advice and support. It covers a range of topics, including energy & household bills, benefits, tax & grants and emergency contacts, as well as physical & mental health and wellbeing. Subscribe to Kim's monthly newsletter First name Last name Email * Join I want to subscribe to your mailing list. Promoted by Colin Berry on behalf of Kim Leadbeater MBE at Tom Myer's House, 9 Cross Crown Street, Cleckheaton, BD19 3HW bottom of page
